```{r}
df <- read.delim("results.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```
```{r}
best_by_genome <- df[order(df$sgenome, -df$bitscore, df$evalue), ]
best_by_genome <- best_by_genome[!duplicated(best_by_genome$sgenome), ]

dim(best_by_genome)
head(best_by_genome[, c("query", "sgenome", "sseqid", "qcovGnm", "qcovHSP", "pident", "alenHSP", "bitscore")], 10)
```
```{r}
hist(best_by_genome$qcovGnm, breaks = 50, main = "qcovGnm", xlab = "Genome coverage of query")
hist(best_by_genome$pident, breaks = 50, main = "pident", xlab = "Percent identity")
hist(best_by_genome$bitscore, breaks = 50, main = "bitscore", xlab = "Bitscore")
```
```{r}
strong_hits <- subset(best_by_genome, qcovGnm >= 55 & pident >= 90)
nrow(strong_hits)
head(strong_hits[, c("sgenome", "sseqid", "qcovGnm", "pident", "bitscore")], 20)
```
```{r}
meta <- read.delim(
  "/home/nacho/HDD16/Nacho/RepliCOOC/derep/hostrange/checks_ejemplos/aeroejemplo/allthebacteriamcr3/species_calls.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  quote = "",
  comment.char = ""
)

# columnas útiles de metadata
meta2 <- meta[, c("sample_accession", "scientific_name", "sylph_species", "HQ")]

# limpiar IDs
meta2$sample_accession <- trimws(as.character(meta2$sample_accession))

# sacar género
meta2$genus <- sub(" .*", "", meta2$scientific_name)

# quitar duplicados
meta2 <- meta2[!duplicated(meta2$sample_accession), ]

# definir strong hits con el criterio que tú quieres
strong_hits <- subset(best_by_genome, qcovGnm >= 55 & pident >= 90)

cat("Número de strong_hits:", nrow(strong_hits), "\n")

# extraer accession desde sseqid
strong_hits$sample_accession <- sub("\\.contig.*$", "", as.character(strong_hits$sseqid))
strong_hits$sample_accession <- trimws(strong_hits$sample_accession)

# comprobar solapamiento
cat("Accessions únicos en strong_hits:", length(unique(strong_hits$sample_accession)), "\n")
cat("Accessions únicos en metadata:", length(unique(meta2$sample_accession)), "\n")
cat("IDs compartidos:", sum(unique(strong_hits$sample_accession) %in% unique(meta2$sample_accession)), "\n")

# merge
strong_hits_meta <- merge(
  strong_hits,
  meta2,
  by = "sample_accession",
  all.x = TRUE,
  sort = FALSE
)

cat("Dimensiones strong_hits_meta:", dim(strong_hits_meta), "\n")
cat("Número de filas tras merge:", nrow(strong_hits_meta), "\n")
cat("Con metadata:", sum(!is.na(strong_hits_meta$scientific_name)), "\n")
cat("Sin metadata:", sum(is.na(strong_hits_meta$scientific_name)), "\n")

# vistazo
head(strong_hits_meta[, c(
  "sample_accession", "scientific_name", "genus",
  "sseqid", "qcovGnm", "pident", "bitscore"
)], 20)

# conteo por género
sort(table(strong_hits_meta$genus), decreasing = TRUE)

# si quieres ver especies
sort(table(strong_hits_meta$scientific_name), decreasing = TRUE)

# no anotados
unmatched <- subset(strong_hits_meta, is.na(scientific_name))
head(unmatched[, c("sample_accession", "sseqid", "qcovGnm", "pident")], 20)
```
